systemStatus.headline: Mon Apr 27 7 AM run — Sling Apr 27 today delivered + Google Ads Apr 26 live + Yelp 30d refreshed.
systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast Sun Apr 26 DPS still not delivered (Toast IQ 'Group' email arrived 6:14 AM PT but Gmail MCP returns no parseable body — same issue as Apr 25 'Group' email). Regular DPS '229 W Montecito St - Sunday, April 26' has not arrived as of 7 AM PT (typically arrives ~7:38–7:40 AM PT). Last fully parsed Toast = Sat Apr 25: $5,479.75 net / 192 guests / 20.8% labor. (2) Sling Mon Apr 27 (today) DELIVERED: 4 staff, 22.42 hrs, 0 OT, 0 uncovered, 3 employees off. Staff: Noel Nunez (Chef), Tony Rincon (Bartender), James Hernadez (Server), Christine Vargas (Server). (3) Google Ads LIVE Apr 26 from Overview page: $21.99 spend, 112 clicks, 6.98K impressions, $0.20 CPC, 1.61% CTR. Active campaign = Local store visits-Performance Max-2; Oldest SB Brewery on Tap remains paused. Optimization score 85.7%. Account balance $258.26, next auto-pay May 1. (4) Yelp 30d refreshed: $809.25 spend Apr 1–26, 93.4k impressions, 251 ads-leads, $3.89 CPL. Bonus $900 FULLY USED ($0 unused remaining — was $1.43 yesterday). (5) TripAdvisor: same UK 5-bubble review from 4/22 — no analytics email in last 24h. (6) Reviews: K Vos 4★ still unanswered (4 days old now). Mother's Day 5/10 9-top still on books. (7) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.

newReview.title: What a find!
newReview.snippet: One day we were looking at the The Brewhouse website from our home in the UK and then we are enjoying lunch at the premises during our holiday. This place was a real find and we loved the craft beer / food. We toured a lot of California and Las Vegas, but this was definitely our favourite find...

tripAdvisor.note: Same 5-bubble review from UK visitors dated 4/22 (no new TripAdvisor activity). No analytics email from analytics@hm2.tripadvisor.com in last 24h — marketing newsletter only.
